title: Multiple assigns to same signal misordered

features.name: multiple assignments to same signal in always @(*) block
features.description: Code should include an always @(*) block with two or more assignments to the same signal

features.name: cross-block signal dependency with unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array where one element is assigned in one always @(*) block and a different element is assigned in another always @(*) block referencing the first

features.name: sequentially assigned signal used in clocked block
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned in a clocked always block that is used by a combinational always block containing multiple assignments to another signal
